headline: Is Deckers Outdoor Corporation (DECK) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is DECK a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Deckers Outdoor Corporation on Ocular Capital’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on DECK. Deckers Outdoor Corporation’s share was trading at $100.78 as of March 13th. DECK’s trailing and forward P/E were 14.32 and 13.8, respectively according to Yahoo Finance. […]

headline: Did UGG’s New Golden Collection Push Into Year-Round Comfort Just Shift Deckers (DECK) Narrative?
summary: In March 2026, UGG, a division of Deckers Brands, launched its Spring 2026 Golden Collection of warm-weather sandals and clogs, extending the brand’s signature comfort into year-round styles and featuring a campaign with Elsa Hosk and Rina Sawayama. The collection’s focus on recycled materials, fresh textures, and silhouettes that reinterpret the Classic Boot suggests Deckers is pushing UGG further into all-season, fashion-forward territory while reinforcing its comfort heritage. Next, we’ll...
